summary: A fictional launch reel introduces a campus cafe with a quick hook, warm product shots, three feature highlights, and a clear launch-week call to action.

keyMoments.label: Opening hook
keyMoments.note: The video immediately introduces the cafe and launch context.

keyMoments.label: Product reveal
keyMoments.note: Close-up shots make the featured drinks easy to recognize.

keyMoments.label: Social proof
keyMoments.note: A group table shot implies a comfortable student gathering space.

keyMoments.label: Call to action
keyMoments.note: The launch-week invite is clear but could stay on screen longer.

strengths: Clear opening question and visual subject.
Warm color palette supports the cafe mood.
improvements: Add one close-up reaction shot before the final offer.
Keep the final location text on screen for at least 2.5 seconds.
Export a square thumbnail with the product and store name visible.
